Welcome & Congratulations I am so glad you're here! I believe in the importance of iconic imagery with a timeless classic elegance that will outlast all the style trends of "today" . I pride myself on taking on a proactive role with my couples during their planning process and  building a strong bond with my clients from the 1st phone call through the wedding day and beyond.
 I want to know all about you & your fiancé. What are dreams & visions for your big day!? And also what are your big concerns & fears? It is my job to alleviate the stress of the unknown and guide you through your planning process starting with your visions of photography & video. 1st step towards an unforgettable photography experience is just 1 click away!

At Amour Daydream Studio, I specialize in creating wedding stationery that captures the heart of your love story. From custom illustrations of meaningful places to watercolor details and refined designs, each piece is crafted to perfectly complement your wedding vision. Whether you're dreaming of timeless elegance, coastal charm, or chic rustic themes, I bring your ideas to life with a blend of artistry and thoughtful details that will leave your guests in awe.

From save the dates to invitations and day-of stationery, I make the design process simple and fun, ensuring every element reflects your unique style. With the flexibility to customize colors, wording, and artwork, Amour Daydream Studio offers a truly tailored experience for couples who value luxury, personalization, and unforgettable guest experiences.

Let’s create something beautiful together!

Based in Middleboro, MA, Lyndsey Locks Bridal provides on site wedding hair styling. We are experienced in various styles and will bring your vision to life. 

We will work one-on-one with you to ensure you feel confident on your special day. During your bridal hair preview appointment we'll work together to understand your style and preferences.
Providing the freshest and most stylish flowers for all of life's special occasions.

Are you looking for a vintage photo booth experience for your wedding, party, or special event? The Birdie Booth in Hudson, MA,  is now accepting bookings for the 2025 & 2026 seasons. Our booth is all things retro and the perfect addition to your event in New England. With our wedding package, you receive:

*5-hour rental - enough time for cocktail hour into evening
*Fully staffed with an on-site attendant
*Printed photos on site, branded with your wedding details
*A keepsake photo album after your event

We service events and venues in Massachusetts, Connecticut & New Hampshire. 

We look forward to being a part of your special day!

www.thebirdieboothevents.com

Our award-winning classical wedding musicians offer the highest level of professionalism and take your wedding to the next level with our vast experience, integrity, huge modern pop library, and unparalleled talent. 

We welcome all loving couples who want epic music for the soundtrack to their love story. ​ Since 2010, we've performed for 700+ weddings and know exactly what to do to give you and your guests an unforgettable experience. From personalized planning meetings to coordinating with your vendors, we go above and beyond to make your wedding everything you've ever envisioned.

Live Music. The Best Musicians. Hear the Difference 

We’ve been playing Top 100 with a Twist since before Bridgerton was cool. Modern pop is our specialty, but as professional classical musicians, our roots are old school. That’s why we say we play all the hits from 1645 to today!
We are a wedding photography and videography company, telling your story!

Esteban Gil, Connecticut based wedding photographer and educator based in Guilford, CT. 

Over the decades, he has honed his raw creative abilities into a talent that is undeniable. Esteban places importance in capturing emotion first and art second, but consistently succeeds in turning most every moment into artistry. His work is easily recognized by his well thought out framing, out-of-the-box creativity, and even more so his imaginative use of light – be it natural or flash.

It’s no surprise that with these skills, particularly his manipulation of light, he has become a sought-after educator in flash photography, as well as an excellent representation of MagMod, as part of their Ambassador Team.

   Esteban has a career that is defined by so much more than just the stunning artwork that comes as a result of his talent behind a camera. His passion began many years ago as a young man with a camera in a small town in Connecticut and that passion became a business in 2014. Through perseverance and relentless pursuit of growth, he developed that love of photography into a successful career. As he has honed his craft and grown in his abilities, Esteban has never forgotten his roots or the communities that embraced him. It is clear that he keeps a love of community at the heart of everything he does and he strives to educate and empower photographers at every level. This firm belief in “community over competition” led to the founding of the creative community, Steel & Flint Society, in 2018. 

  Through the Steel & Flint workshops and corresponding Facebook community, Esteban has cultivated an environment that fosters growth through education, group discussions, artistic challenges, unlimited access to guidance and advice, and friendships. As he continually strives to grown in his own abilities and career, he never hesitates to advise, encourage, and help others to grow. It is clear to those that have had the opportunity to meet and learn from him. He chooses to put just as much value into the people he creates for and the people he creates with as he does his own profession – and for that he has become not just a leader in the industry, but a mentor, and – to many – a friend

Mandy Wright is an award-winning travel wedding photographer with a passion for capturing the raw emotion and telling the unique story behind every couple's special day. With a portfolio that spans the globe, Mandy has a knack for transforming breathtaking locations into stunning backdrops, creating images that resonate with love and authenticity.

What sets Mandy apart is her dedication to storytelling through photography. With a background in architecture and design each shot she takes is infused with artistry, a deep understanding of her clients' personalities, and of course elements of the location. Thus ensuring that your wedding photos are not just beautiful but also deeply personal. Whether it's a sun-soaked beach ceremony or an intimate gathering in the Tuscan hillside, Mandy’s keen eye for detail and ability to connect with couples results in images that are both timeless and evocative.

In addition to photography, Mandy is a passionate educator, empowering aspiring photographers to develop their skills and unleash their creative potential. She believes that great photography comes from understanding both the technical aspects and the heart behind the lens.

You won't be able to stop staring at yourself in the mirror before walking down the aisle when you hire the Unveil Your Love team! With 10 years of experience, we know how to make our brides look and feel confident and beautiful.

We are a traveling wedding hair and makeup team that loves doing minimal & soft makeup looks and romantic & timeless hair. We love updos and half-ups! Both airbrush and traditional foundation are offered for clients and false lashes are included or no up-charge.

We customize each look to fit our bride's specific bridal beauty vision and ensure our brides have a great morning with us vibing to their getting-ready playlist. We plan out a beauty timeline as well, so there is one less thing on your to-do list and everyone will be finished on time. Check out our beauty services and more portfolio on our website and contact us to see if we are available for your special day!

Cait began her career as a fine art wedding photographer in 2013. Her couple’s wedding days have been featured in Vogue, The Washington Post, The Connecticut Bride, TLC,  and Newsweek. Cait's style can be described as timeless, avant-garde, creative, & iconic.  She shoots intentionally with each frame, ensuring each frame is worthy of hanging in her couple's homes.

Cait has had the honor of photographing weddings throughout the U.S., Mexico, and Europe, where she's drawn inspiration from the different countries she's traveled.  She also draws inspiration from cinematic movies, often rewatching her favorites in different lenses of perspective when viewing, to carefully observe light, shadows, & interesting angles.

Cait Fletcher is based in Durham, Connecticut (a charming farm town well known for their annual Durham Fair) where she lives with her partner, Jason, & her hundreds of tropical plants & wildlife.

I'm a wedding and elopement photographer based right in Baltimore, MD. Originally from Greece. There is nothing that makes me happier than capturing laughter, love, and connections. I believe that everything happens for a reason

Capturing what makes your love story unique goes beyond words—it’s about connection. When we chat, it’s not just about the wedding day; it’s about discovering who you are as a couple and as individuals. I want you to feel completely at ease, being your true selves, because that’s when the magic happens—the most genuine, heartfelt images come to life. And it’s just as important that you get to know me, too. Let’s laugh, share stories, and create something great together.

A dad, a son, a brother and a jack of all trades musician that loves to rock out any chance I get. I grew up in New York City. My inclination towards photography came from classic street photography and photojournalists from all over the world that told their stories through a lens. It made me pick up a camera and start shooting. Now, living in Maryland I shoot all sorts of stories and moments locally, domestically, and abroad. It's taken me a while to figure out what my "thing" is but I've come to figure out that I'm a milestone photographer. The moments your life that have proven to be meaningful -- I'll be there.

I believe in finding the humanity in anything I shoot. You can see that in my work both in weddings and intimate portraiture. Making my clients feel seen and heard is very important. Developing a close relationship with a photographer that's going to be by your side for your entire day is very important which is why by the time it's your wedding date we've already gotten to know each other very well through a series of meetings and communication. I look forward to hearing from you!

Capturing Unforgettable Love Stories Throughout New England

 Your love deserves to be celebrated like no other and whether you're all about shaking things up or embracing tradition, you've come to the right place.

From intimate elopements to grand celebrations, I'll be there to preserve every single breathtaking second. Together, let's make your love story an unforgettable work of art, tailored to your unique style.

So, are you ready to rock this wedding thing, your way? Let's do it! Reach out today and let's create timeless memories that will make your heart sing.  Embrace the extraordinary, or cherish the classic!

Get married. Be loved.

Hi, I’m Kyle, the founder of OWL Audio/Visual. I am a Video Producer specializing in Cinematic and Documentary shooting.

I find immense joy in creating wedding films that reflect each couple’s unique story. Having grown up with a deep appreciation for the art of storytelling, I approach every wedding with care and creativity, focusing on the moments that matter most: the laughter, the tears, and the love shared on your special day.

My style combines cinematic visuals with thoughtful editing to ensure that every frame feels authentic and timeless. For me, it’s not just about filming your day—it’s about crafting a keepsake that allows you to relive it for years to come.

Being trusted to capture such an important chapter in your life is a responsibility I don’t take lightly—and one I feel privileged to fulfill.

Let’s create something truly unforgettable together.

Hey there! I'm Alyssa, a photographer passionate about capturing the beauty of love and the warmth of family bonds. From the tender moments of weddings to the joyous chaos of family gatherings, I specialize in freezing those priceless memories in time. Let's create timeless treasures together! I believe every click of the shutter is an opportunity to create something truly remarkable. Whether it's a wedding, a family portrait session, or a first birthday session, I approach each project with creativity, professionalism, and a commitment to exceeding our clients' expectations.

Your wedding day is made up of once-in-a-lifetime moments—ones that deserve to be captured beautifully, authentically, and in a way that stands the test of time. At Kelsey Sheehan Photography, I specialize in true-to-color, romantic imagery that allows you to relive every emotion, from the quiet, intimate exchanges to the joyful, unfiltered celebrations.

With a documentary approach and an eye for storytelling, I focus on capturing real moments as they unfold—so you can stay present and enjoy your day without feeling overly posed or staged. Whether it’s a heartfelt first look, a fleeting glance, or the energy of the dance floor, I ensure your wedding photos reflect the genuine emotions and atmosphere of your day.

I provide a personalized experience and work closely with my couples to create a seamless, stress-free photography process. If you’re looking for timeless images that feel effortless and true to you, I’d love to hear more about your wedding!

📍 Based in Rhode Island | Available throughout New England & beyond

📩 Now booking 2026 weddings—Inquire today!
Wedding photography for the life in your life!

Beautifully posed and produced images are great, but for me—especially when it comes to weddings—manufactured moments don’t carry the emotional heft that the occasion deserves. When I look back at photos from my life, it’s the candid moments—captured by and with close friends and family—that bring the memories and emotions flooding back, the ones that truly stick. That’s how I want your wedding photos to feel for the rest of your life—like a warm, familiar hug.

Starting out in street photography and behind-the-scenes work on film sets, I’ve always believed that the most significant moments a wedding photographer can capture are those untouched by their own influence. My goal is to observe and preserve your day artistically as it naturally unfolds—creating images that allow you to truly see yourselves and your relationship.

I’ll guide when needed, but your day belongs to you, not any photographer’s schedule or shot list. This approach lets your timeline and how you experience the day pave the way for genuine, authentic moments. A wedding is a once-in-a-lifetime experience—and you should, well, experience it, not perform it. Your time should be spent making memories, not taking photos.

I limit my bookings each year to ensure that couples are given my complete focus and creative energy. If this approach resonates with you, let’s chat—I’d love to hear about your wedding plans.

Hi, I’m Erica, the lead photographer at Stella Blue Photography. With over 10 years of experience in the wedding industry, a thriving studio in Simsbury, Connecticut and a degree in Photography from RISD, I cannot wait show you how beautiful your story is. I am most known for my grounded approach to capturing those fleeting moments, attention to detail (in editing and photographing) and for putting you at ease so I can truly capture you at your best. 

What I love most are the candid shots—those genuine moments when you have a cocktail in hand and are surrounded by family and love. There’s an unreplicable energy at weddings that I’m so excited for you to experience and for me to capture.

Wedding Photographer serving all of Western Mass
Ever since I can remember, I've always been drawn to the art of capturing moments. The simple act of pressing a button, freezing time, and immortalizing a fleeting instance is something that has always fascinated me. I am Ron, a man of simple pleasures, and photography is my passion. It began as a hobby, a mere pastime that I indulged in during my spare hours. But as time passed, it became an integral part of my existence, something that defined who I was, and who I wanted to be, and now I'm doing what I was born to do- I Capture Memories!

I've been blessed to share my life with my beautiful wife for 33 blissful years. Together, we've raised two extraordinary boys, Samuel Andrew and Gabriel Seth, who have been my greatest inspirations. Samuel was born prematurely at 25 weeks, weighing only 1 pound 7 ounces. He was given a mere 3% chance of survival. Despite the odds, he fought his way through, and today, he is a 24-year-old computer whiz with an Associate's degree from HCC.

Our younger son, Gabriel, was born with a rare blood disorder that affects only 3% of the world's population. His journey has been equally challenging and inspiring. Today, he is a 20-year-old college sophomore at STCC, making us proud every single day.

As a father, I've understood the importance of documenting life's precious moments. During the early years of my sons' lives, when they spent countless hours in the NICU at Baystate Medical Center, my camera was my constant companion. I took hundreds of photographs, capturing every triumph and setback, every smile and tear. Those pictures tell a story of resilience, love, and hope - a narrative that is close to my heart.

Photography has not just remained a personal passion, but has also become my professional pursuit. From weddings, families, high school seniors, to headshots and maternity shoots, my camera has allowed me to be a part of countless stories. I've had the privilege of photographing the iconic "Yankee Candle" in South Deerfield, MA, and working with IHeart Radio to capture the staff of MIX 93.1fm and KIX 100.9fm and their concerts. I've clicked the likes of Luke Bryan, Darius Rucker, Miranda Lambert, Lady A, Eric Church, The Swon Brothers, Jake Owen, and Kelsea Ballerini.

But perhaps, what gives me the most satisfaction is donating my time and services to charities like the March of Dimes, St Jude, CMN, Baystate Medical Center and many local community benefits. It's my way of giving back, of using my passion to make a difference.

"Let there be Light" - these words guide my journey. I see myself not just as a photographer, but also as a storyteller, a documentarian of life. Through my lens, I serve my God and my community, capturing moments of joy, sorrow, triumph, and love, and in the process, creating memories that will last a lifetime.

Hi I'm Kayla! I'm a Boston-based documentary style wedding photographer. I began my career in 2013, photographing weddings as a side hustle while working full time as a newspaper photojournalist and then later as a team photographer for the New York Mets. In 2021 I made the decision to step out on my own and start my own wedding photography business so that I could focus on photographing weddings full time. 

Wedding photography is a dream job for me. It allows me to flex my strength in narrative, journalistic photography by telling the story of your wedding day as a journalist would, from the margins, without becoming a character in that story. I value creating honest, candid images that reflect the truth, emotion, & importance of your relationships and love. I believe it’s an honor to capture these intimate moments and truly appreciate the trust and openness given to me to allow me to do what I do.

Hello there. I'm T.J.

Your tattooed coffee connoisseur and Wookiee linguist with a set of chops that make Wolverine cry.

Worried your wedding photos will feel just like everyone else’s, stiff posed and missing the spark that makes them you?

If Your relationship is bold, loud, and full of life, shouldn’t your photos be too?

Together we will craft photos that scream color and humanity through a process built on connection and intention.

I want you to LIVE every second, knowing your memories will be captured with creativity, authenticity, and life.

This historic space has been outfitted with every modern amenity to be the ideal space to host the perfect wedding.  We provide a non-traditional venue so that our clients have a blank slate to start from and can make the space their own. Without any décor, the soaring ceilings and cement walls feel "industrial chic" but clients can transform the space with glitz and glam, rustic touches, romantic lighting, modern lines, whimsical details, and vintage furniture.  If you can dream it, it can be done at Olio.

Located just North of Boston, Massachusetts, in the heart of New England, the venue is conveniently located and easily accessible to Logan Airport and nearby accommodations and attractions. Olio caters to all couples, particularly those who have a unique vision, background, or love story.  Olio welcomes all and actively seeks out LGBTQIA+ identifying clients.

Olio is a family business, launched by Sarah Narcus after a decade planning events with her wedding coordination company, Without A Hitch, in partnership with her mom. Olio is professionally designed and operated so that all couples are taken care of.  

Perfect for weddings with an onsite ceremony of 25 to 200, and with an off-site ceremony up to 300. Pricing and lots more information, including FAQs and tips/tricks are on Olio's website and social media accounts. Inquire today to schedule a tour!

Hi, I'm Katie! I'm a documentary wedding photographer and the owner of Brave Hearts Photography, with over 11 years of experience in the industry. I'm known for my ability to capture authentic, heartfelt moments, blending artistry with a candid style, and focusing on the genuine connections that make each wedding unique. I live in East Greenwich, Rhode Island, with my husband, son, and two rescue dogs. When I'm not behind the camera, I enjoy skiing, cheering on my alma mater, Providence College, and volunteering for gardening-related charities.

We are passionate Houston wedding photographers on a mission to tell your story. Through our lens, we capture the essence of your relationship - the friendship, romance, and love - through cinematic imagery. We transform these heartfelt moments into awe-inspiring artwork, creating a timeless wedding album that becomes your first family heirloom.

You enjoy your wedding day. I'll take care of the photography.

After numerous years of photographing weddings, I’ve really come to value the unexpected, intimate moments that take place on a wedding day.

The hug your mom gives you before you leave your dressing room.
The tear that falls down your partner’s cheek when they see you for the first time.
The way the two of you lean your heads together during the toasts.
This day is about more than the flowers and the shoes you chose.
It’s about celebrating the start of a new family.

On your wedding day, you’ll breathe a little easier knowing I’m there to capture everything that matters to you. You can be present in every moment having a grand ol’ time with your crew and all the glowy feelings that come from getting married!

Dazy Florals is a wedding & event floral studio that creates vibrant, thoughtful floral experiences for those who love flowers, value creativity, and appreciate the beauty of seasonal, sustainable blooms.
We specialize in Day of Coordination

Hi my name is Elyse Heise and I'm a documentary style photographer.  I cover all of New England, Hudson Valley and Minnesota! I love shooting in bold, full-color, with lots of drama and a focus on candid moments
​

I graduated from UMass-Amherst with a degree in Journalism and a focus on Photojournalism.  So it's no wonder that I like to take photos with a documentary style approach!


Backyard, and offbeat weddings are my absolute favs, but I shoot all sorts of events and subjects. And you're always welcome to bring your dog!

Based in New York City, The Hook Club is one of the tri-state area's most exciting and unique wedding bands. Owned and operated by a tight-knit community of musicians, they are known for their attention to every musical detail and the professionalism they bring to every event. Their unconventional group has mastered the art of creating a great dance party that keeps guests on the dance floor all night and then humming the songs the next day!

The Hook Club’s specialty is to take every audience on a journey they will never forget. From timeless classics to today's dance hits, their instrumentalists dazzle crowds for hours on end with their high-energy arrangements, while their diverse roster of vocalists get the crowd dancing and singing top 40, classic rock, and hip-hop hits on the dance floor. When The Hook Club plays, they get the whole room involved, and everyone leaves feeling like a member of the band!

They offer three configurations of The Hook Club for weddings - Full Band, Classic Band, and DJ Band hybrid. In addition, they provide a wide range of ceremony and cocktail hour music options, including string quartets, trios, and other bespoke ensembles. They have their own professional production team, so they are well-equipped to provide high-end sound systems, ceremony microphones, dance lighting, and many other services.

As an independent group, their clients work directly with the band, never through a talent agency or management company, so their performance is guaranteed to be suited to your personal style. Send them a message or give them a call to start planning the perfect music for your wedding!

Hey there, I’m David! I’m a down-to-earth wedding photographer based in NJ, born and raised with strong family values that keep me grounded. My passion is capturing genuine connections and turning fleeting moments into timeless memories. When I’m not behind the camera, you’ll find me spending time with my three dogs! My mission is to capture beautifully real, candid moments—big or small—so you can relive them forever.

You're going to have fun with me as your photographer. My job is to make you look your best, but also let you enjoy your wedding day. I direct as much as needed but also let the love of the day shape the photos we take. It's a party after all isn't it?

Christian Cardona is a documentary and editorial wedding photographer based in Atlanta, Georgia, dedicated to creating timeless memories of your special day. With a keen eye for detail and a passion for storytelling, he captures the essence of your love, the joy of your families, and the unforgettable moments shared with your friends, ensuring every image reflects the beauty and emotions of your wedding.

SLEEK, MODERN, SOPHISTICATED WEDDING PHOTOGRAPHY WITH AN EDITORIAL EDGE. 
CAPTURING THE AUTHENTICITY OF YOUR WEDDING DAY THROUGH STRIKING IMAGES BRINGING MAGAZINE-WORTHY FEEL TO YOUR LOVE STORY. 
For couples wanting something that pushes the boundaries of what a wedding should look like.


I’VE ALWAYS BEEN DRAWN TO THE AESTHETIC OF EDITORIAL MAGAZINE-STYLE PHOTOGRAPHY WITH AN EDGE - STYLISH POSES, INDUSTRIAL LANDSCAPES, AND AUTHENTIC, IMPERFECT MOMENTS, ALL TIED TOGETHER BY INTRIGUING LIGHTING AND UNCONVENTIONAL COMPOSITIONS.


NOT EVERY PHOTO NEEDS A SMILE, PERFECT HAIR AND SUNNY SKIES. I EMBRACE WHATEVER IS GIVEN AND LOVE CREATING SOMETHING BEAUTIFUL OUT OF IT. BECAUSE WHAT MIGHT SEEM ORDINARY IN REALITY LOOKS ABSOLUTELY EXTRAORDINARY THROUGH THE LENS.

 THERE’S AN ART TO KEEPING IT SIMPLE. NO OVER EDITING - JUST REAL, TRUE TO LIFE IMAGES YOU WILL LOVE AS MUCH IN TWENTY YEARS.

I work with couples who want to marry their best friend and throw an unforgettable party. No forced poses, no artificial scenes, just pure, heartfelt memories of your celebration with the ones you love.

As a licensed esthetician and professional makeup artist with over 14 years of experience, I specialize in radiant, photo-ready bridal looks that enhance your natural beauty. I offer on-location services throughout New England, complete with customized skin prep, individual lashes, and a seamless, stress-free experience for you and your bridal party from preview to wedding day.

The Mansion at Bald Hill is a historic, private mansion that serves as a premier wedding venue, gourmet restaurant, and B&B in South Woodstock, Connecticut. The mansion is a historic landmark that offers a private, quiet getaway – making it the perfect venue for your wedding day. The team of award-winning chefs uses the highest quality of fresh, organic, and local ingredients to create unique seasonal menus personalized for you. The mansion hosts six elegant guest rooms for overnight stays and has beautiful grounds and gardens where you will celebrate your special day.
Wedding photographer

Formal Indulgence Espresso Bar Catering delivers a luxurious and unforgettable experience with its premium espresso bar, expertly crafted by skilled baristas. Perfect for weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations, our service extends beyond coffee to include indulgent offerings like a Cannoli Bar with customizable fillings, a decadent Chocolate Fountain for dipping fresh fruits and treats, a whimsical Donut Station with a variety of glazes and toppings, and a sophisticated Pastry Station featuring an array of gourmet delights. Each station is elegantly styled to match your event’s theme, creating an atmosphere of refinement and indulgence. From freshly brewed espresso drinks to exquisite desserts, Formal Indulgence ensures every guest is treated to a moment of sweetness and sophistication. Let us elevate your next event with exceptional taste and unparalleled service.

At Mercier Music Weddings and Events, we believe that the right music can transform your wedding into a celebration your guests will never forget. With over 14 years of experience, we specialize in crafting unforgettable wedding experiences through dynamic DJ and videography services that reflect your unique love story.

Led by Shane Mercier, an award-winning wedding DJ and seasoned entertainer, our philosophy is simple: “You bring the dancers, and I’ll bring the music.” Every beat, every transition, and every announcement is tailored to your vision, ensuring your big day flows seamlessly and keeps the energy alive from start to finish.

What sets us apart? It’s all about enthusiasm. Enthusiasm drives our passion for creating moments that matter—whether it’s your first dance, a packed dance floor, or those emotional highlights captured on video. Through careful observation, expert crowd reading, and years of experience, we know how to bring your celebration to life in a way that your guests will rave about for years.

Our Services Include:

Customizable wedding DJ packages
Professional videography services
State-of-the-art sound and lighting setups
Expert timeline and event coordination
Whether you're envisioning a romantic outdoor ceremony, a glamorous ballroom reception, or an intimate gathering, Mercier Music is here to deliver a personalized, stress-free, and unforgettable wedding day experience.

Let us help you create the soundtrack to your love story—and the memories to match.

Book Mercier Music Weddings and Events today and experience entertainment as great as your love story deserves.

At For Every Joccasion, we’re not just planners; we’re magic makers. From event planning to carefully curated rentals, we handle each detail with care and creativity. Whether you’re celebrating a wedding, anniversary, or any milestone in between, our goal is to craft an event that feels like home; a day filled with warmth, elegance, and unforgettable memories shared with those who matter most.
I am a mobile bartender that is based out of Hooksett, NH. I specialize in weddings and private events and custom signature drinks.

If you could relive your wedding day after-the-fact, would you? Everyone wants to remember their wedding day - that's why finding a photographer is one of the first things a couple usually does. But do you want to just remember your wedding day, or do you want to relive it? There's no question that when it comes to preserving these memories, video captures them in a much more immersive way than photographs. Union Station is Northampton’s newest modernized banquet facility, however its early Gothic building has been a fixture for over 100 years. Originally built in 1897 by renowned architect H.H. Richardson, Union Station was the pinnacle of excitement as thousands boarded trains to far off destinations.
In the 19th century Union Station hosted Presidents, college students, and brave military members returning home. Union Station began its story capturing a spectrum of emotions as travelers began their journeys, and it is in this spirit that the venue continues to provide the beginnings of stories as unique its history, ever capturing these moments in time.
Union Station pairs its rich history with modernization, featuring The Roosevelt Room- a premiere 200 seat ballroom, The Notch 8 Grille– a newly built upscale steakhouse, The Tunnel Bar– an underground martini lounge with a speakeasy- vibe, and The Deck– a casual outdoor bar and restaurant. We have a space for any occasion within our beacon of Northampton hospitality, and we also offer off-site catering, and a shuttle trolley service, The Union Station Express!
